id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c6-semantic__0000
text: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector. [State of Sectors](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/stand-van-sectoren/index.html). [Technology, Media & Telecom](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/zakelijk/insights/sectoren-en-trends/technologie/index.html). ![IT strongest grower within the TMT sector](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/IT%20sterktste%20groeier_54629350_860x538_tcm16-70858.jpg). 05/02/2018 • 2 minutes read.

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c6-semantic__0002
text: The Dutch economy continues to grow strongly and the TMT sector is benefiting. It is mainly IT companies that are showing strong growth, and TV content companies are also on the up. However, the sector shows major differences, and branches such as publishers and printers are struggling.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c6-semantic__0002

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c6-semantic__0003
text:
Download the full report. (Don’t see a download or unable to download the report? Then upgrade your browser to the most recent version.)
[State of TMT (5 February 2020). 1 MB](https://www.abnamro.nl/nl/media/Stand-van-tmt-februari-2018_tcm16-70905.pdf)
Favourable economic climate. The economic climate is favourable for the TMT sector.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c6-semantic__0003
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c6-semantic__0004
text: The Dutch economy grew by 3.2% in 2017, and in 2018 GDP will increase by 2.9%. The main economic indicators are also positive. Producer confidence and consumer confidence are high, capacity utilisation in industry is high, exports continue to pick up and the number of jobs and vacancies keeps rising. Fewer and fewer obstacles in the sector, but labour shortages remain a problem. Entrepreneurs in the sector experience fewer obstacles to running their businesses. However, the labour shortage remains a major problem. More than one-fifth of entrepreneurs are severely affected by this. Business confidence in the sector has fallen slightly, but at 13.3 it is still at a high level. IT sector is the driving force; publishers, printers and telecoms in the red. The IT companies segment, the largest within TMT, continues to grow strongly. Ongoing digitalisation and a favourable economic climate are the reasons for this. Wholesale trade in ICT and TV content companies also benefit from the economic boom.

metadata.chunk_id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c6-semantic__0004
metadata.source_slug: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector
metadata.source_title: IT sector is the strongest grower within the TMT sector

id: IT branche sterkste groeier binnen TMT sector__c6-semantic__0005
text: However, there are also segments that are struggling. Publishers, printers and telecoms will also show revenue decline next year.

Read more in the technology sector. Technology, Media & Telecom (TMT) is one of the fastest-growing sectors. Helped by the increasing use of software, algorithms and sensors, this sector forms the basis of the digital renewal of other sectors.
